summary: Iteration 4 (frontend-only re-test of regression fix): The CRITICAL regression from iteration 3 is FIXED. Plain taps on keypad keys now register correctly — tap key-5 -> $0.05, sequence 1,2,3 -> $51.23, key-del removes one digit ($5.12), key-c clears to $0.00. The original swipe-while-pressing fix is preserved: press-and-drag horizontally starting on key-5 switches segment to Catalog WITHOUT entering 5 (amount stays $0.00). Pure swipes work both directions (Key In <-> Catalog <-> Quick List) with sliding pill + dots updating. AI assistant orb works end-to-end and returns the expected $1,284.50 from Claude Sonnet 4.5. All 4 new sub-pages from iteration 3 still render (/customers, /inventory, /reports, /payouts) and tile routing works for Customers/Inventory/Reports/Payouts/Transactions/Notifications. 'Coming soon' sonner toast fires for non-routed tiles (verified with more-orders). 13/14 explicit assertions PASS. The only finding is a minor layout bug: the 'Devices' tile in the 4th 'Tools & Settings' grid row on the More page sits partially behind the fixed bottom-nav bar, so a real tap near its centre is intercepted by the bottom-nav (lands on nav-activity). Routing logic itself is correct — direct goto /devices and a JS-level click on more-devices both navigate successfully. Fix: add bottom padding (e.g., pb-28) to the More page scroll container so the last row clears the 70-80px fixed bottom nav.

ui_bugs.issue: Last grid row ('Tools & Settings' section, containing Devices/Notifications/Settings/Support tiles) is partially obscured by the fixed BottomNav bar. A real tap on the more-devices tile is intercepted by the bottom-nav and lands on nav-activity, navigating to /activity instead of /devices. Routing is correct (JS click + direct URL both work) — this is purely a layout/overlap issue.

issues: Bottom padding on the scroll container is only pb-6 (24px) but the fixed BottomNav is ~70-80px tall — increase to pb-28 / pb-32 so the last tile row is fully tappable above the nav.

action_items: Increase bottom padding on MorePage's outer container (currently 'pb-6' on the div with data-testid='more-page' in /app/frontend/src/pages/MorePage.jsx line 87) to something like 'pb-28' or 'pb-32' so the 'Tools & Settings' row (Devices, Notifications, Settings, Support tiles) is no longer overlapped by the fixed bottom-nav. Routing is already correct.
Optional polish: same pb fix is worth auditing on CustomersPage / InventoryPage / ReportsPage / PayoutsPage if they also have a fixed bottom-nav and long scroll content.
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx swipe handler is now correct: setPointerCapture is deferred until horizontal lock is established, preserving both pure taps (no movement -> click reaches inner button) and swipes (capture engages mid-gesture so inner buttons can't steal pointermove).

MorePage.jsx uses only pb-6 on its scroll container while the BottomNav is fixed and ~70-80px tall — last-row tiles overlap the nav. This is a pattern that should be standardised app-wide via a layout primitive (e.g., a <PageBody/> with built-in bottom safe-area padding for the nav).
Touchaction 'pan-y' on swipe-carousel is appropriate; keep it.
Consider extracting Segmented + KeyInView + CatalogView + QuickListView from HomePage.jsx (545 lines) into /components/home/* for maintainability.
ROUTE_MAP in MorePage.jsx duplicates information that could live on the moreSections items themselves (e.g., add an optional `route` field) — single-sourcing would prevent future divergence.

success_rate.frontend: 13/14 tests pass (93%) — only the layout overlap on more-devices tile fails

context_for_next_testing_agent: The iteration-3 keypad-tap regression is fully fixed and verified via Playwright (page.click on each digit produces correct amount-display). Swipe gestures (including swipe-while-pressing-a-key) work. AI orb returns the expected $1,284.50 via Claude Sonnet 4.5. The only remaining UI finding is that the 'Devices' tile (more-devices) on the More page sits behind the fixed bottom-nav, so a real centre-tap routes to /activity via the nav-activity icon. To verify a fix, set viewport 390x844, goto /more, scroll the page if needed, and click [data-testid='more-devices'] — URL should be /devices. Other routed tiles (more-customers / more-inventory / more-reports / more-payouts / more-transactions / more-notifs) all work and land on the expected page. Use data-testid='more-orders' (or any non-routed tile like more-settings) to test the 'coming soon' sonner toast.

rca of the issue.title: more-devices tile click routes to /activity instead of /devices (layout overlap, not routing logic)
rca of the issue.reproduction: 1. Open /more on viewport 390x844. 2. Without scrolling, attempt to click [data-testid='more-devices'] in the 'Tools & Settings' row. 3. URL becomes /activity. JS click via page.evaluate or direct goto /devices both work — only a real pointer click fails.
rca of the issue.root_cause: MorePage.jsx's outer container has only `pb-6` (24px bottom padding). The BottomNav is `position: fixed` at the bottom of the viewport (~70-80px tall, z-30+). When the More page is scrolled to the end, the last tile row ('Tools & Settings' containing Devices) sits at y≈820 in a 844px viewport, behind the fixed bottom-nav. A tap at the tile's geometric centre therefore lands on the nav-activity icon of the BottomNav and navigates to /activity. Playwright `force=True` does not bypass z-order overlap on real DOM event dispatch.
rca of the issue.mitigation: Increase MorePage's outer wrapper padding-bottom so the last row clears the fixed bottom-nav. Quick fix: change `<div className="pb-6" data-testid="more-page">` to `<div className="pb-28" ...>` in /app/frontend/src/pages/MorePage.jsx (or pb-32 to be safe). Long-term: introduce a shared <PageBody/> primitive that applies a bottom-safe-area + nav-height padding automatically for every routed page.
